REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, NOTICE OF SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE BY DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT ANY CLAIM IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ARISES OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY. THIS ACTION IS BASED ON A NON-PROTECTED ACTIVITY OF "LOCK OUT," NOT ON PERSECUTION OF PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION OR ON ENTERING INTO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
